goal: Describe the issue and tell the solutions to it .!
detected_issue: App Crash and Refund Delay in Customer Support
root_cause: Database Error
recommended_action: Implement database error handling mechanisms to prevent app crashes and refund delays.
insights: Low frequency of App Crash incidents (1 occurrence) suggests a specific issue with iOS 17.2 users.
Refund Delay incidents are more frequent (2 occurrences), indicating a potential issue with billing or customer support processes.
Database Error is the top issue category, suggesting a critical underlying cause for operational incidents.
critic_feedback: Investigate billing and customer support processes for potential issues.
